recentGames.title: Recent games
recentGames.empty: No games yet. Start your first one against the bot.

activityHeatmap.title: Activity heatmap
activityHeatmap.description: Games and solved puzzles over the last 6 months.
activityHeatmap.summary: {count, plural, one {# training session in the last 6 months} other {# training sessions in the last 6 months}}
activityHeatmap.srSummary: Over the last 6 months, you have {activityCount, plural, one {# training session} other {# training sessions}} across {activeDays, plural, one {# active day} other {# active days}}. Darker cells mean more training on that day.
activityHeatmap.legendDescription: Color shows how active your training was on a given day.
activityHeatmap.trainingCount: {count, plural, one {# training session} other {# training sessions}}

payment.checkoutError: Could not open the checkout page.
payment.alreadySubscribed: You already have a subscription. Manage it in settings.
payment.portalError: Could not open the billing portal.
payment.upgradeSuccess: Payment received! If the status hasn't updated yet, refresh the page in a few seconds.

quote.p1: This project was built in about {hours} hours of straight coding.
quote.p2: You sent me the email about the second stage of the application about two days ago. Around that time I was at an event at {school}, where our team won {prize}.
quote.p3: So I didn't have much time to start earlier. Not making excuses, just giving context. Once the event wrapped up today, I sat down and built this. Keep in mind: roughly {hours} hours of work.

landing.heroDescription: Play a game against the bot, get a warm breakdown of each mistake from the AI coach. Cognitive workout for adults 45+, 10 minutes a day.
landing.authErrorTitle: Could not sign in with Google
landing.authErrorDescription: Check your Google OAuth settings in Supabase and try again.

pricing.title: Sharpki Pro
pricing.description: The paid tier removes limits on AI reviews and keeps your daily training going without interruptions.
pricing.canceledNotice: Checkout was closed before payment. You can come back to plan selection any time.
pricing.signInDescription: Stripe Checkout only works for logged-in users so we can link the subscription to your profile right away.
pricing.benefit1: • AI reviews with no daily cap

play.title: New game
play.description: The Russian checkers engine is wired in. Pick your color and bot strength, then start a real game.
play.errorInvalid: Pick your color and bot level again.
play.errorCreate: Could not create the game. Try again.
play.colorDescription: White moves first. Playing black lets you test the bot's opening reply right away.
play.blackDescription: The bot makes the first move.
play.easyDescription: Makes random moves. Good for a first game.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Account, subscription status, and quick actions.
settings.portalReturned: Page updated after returning from Stripe Portal.
settings.gamePreferencesDescription: Control board hints, capture input method, and game appearance.
settings.showLegalMovesDescription: Highlight squares you can move to or capture on right now.
settings.showRecommendedDescription: Highlight one engine-suggested move during your turn.
settings.captureModeDescription: In Russian checkers, a capture must still finish completely, but you can change how you pick the path.
settings.captureFullMoveDescription: Click once and the piece takes the entire capture path.
settings.captureStepByStepDescription: During a chain capture, pick the next victim at each step.
settings.boardThemeDescription: Pick a look that's comfortable for long sessions.

history.title: Game history
history.gamesDescription: Showing {count} games. Click a game to see the analysis.

puzzles.notLoaded: Puzzles haven't loaded yet. Check back later.
puzzles.allCompleteDescription: You've solved every available puzzle for now. New ones will arrive later.
puzzles.limitDescription: Upgrade to Sharpki Pro to keep training after your {count} free daily tasks.

gameSession.title: Game session
gameSession.description: The engine runs locally in the interface, and the finished game is saved through server-side move validation.

analysis.title: Game review
analysis.description: This page reuses a cached review when available and requests a fresh one on first open.

gameResult.winWhite: You took white all the way to a win.
gameResult.winBlack: You survived white's opening and won with black.
gameResult.lossDescription: The game didn't go your way this time.
gameResult.abortedDescription: You ended the game before it finished.
gameResult.drawDescription: The game ended in a draw.
gameResult.saveError: Could not save the game. Hit "Retry save."
gameResult.rateLimitError: Game limit for the current period is reached.

puzzleBoard.tryAgain: Try again — find the best move.

puzzleSolve.saveError: Could not save the puzzle solution.
puzzleSolve.dailyLimitError: Today's free daily puzzle limit is used up.
